					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-b655bff" data-id="b655bff" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-85028dc elementor-widget__width-initial elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="85028dc" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Frequently Asked Questions</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-cb8fac3 elementor-widget-divider--view-line elementor-widget elementor-widget-divider" data-id="cb8fac3" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="divider.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-divider">
			<span class="elementor-divider-separator">
						</span>
		</div>
						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6caf149 faq-accord elementor-widget elementor-widget-accordion" data-id="6caf149" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="accordion.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-accordion">
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-1131" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="1" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-1131" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">What types of treatment programs for drug and alcohol addiction are  typically offered in Southern California?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-1131" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="1" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-1131"><p><strong>Treatment types generally fall into one of these categories:</strong></p><ul><li>Detox</li><li>Residential Inpatient</li><li>Intensive Outpatient</li><li>Partial Hospitalization</li><li>Sober Living</li><li>[And more…]</li></ul><p>At SCRC, we do it all. Our programs incorporate evidence-based therapies like CBT and DBT, holistic wellness approaches like Nutrition and Yoga, and 12-step support groups.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-1132" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="2" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-1132" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">What should I look for in a good drug and alcohol treatment center in Southern California?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-1132" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="2" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-1132"><h6>Here are the top things to look out for:</h6><ol><li>First and foremost, it’s crucial that the treatment center you choose be fully accredited with the Joint Commission and DHCS.</li><li>Once you’ve confirmed that, browse their Staff or About Us page to see the qualifications and clinical background of the decision-makers and team.</li><li>Research the treatment modalities they offer (ideally, they should offer a wide range, and the modalities should be relevant to your situation).</li><li>Do some research on their Location. Would you enjoy spending time there?</li><li>Make sure they offer personalized treatment plans for every patient, and that they don’t take a dogmatic, one-size-fits-all approach.</li><li>Finally, take a look at their aftercare, or post-treatment support, and make sure they offer sober living and alumni options.</li></ol></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-1133" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="3" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-1133" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">How long do drug and alcohol treatment programs typically last in Southern California?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-1133" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="3" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-1133"><p>The length of your stay can vary, depending on your needs and the severity of your condition. Clients commonly stay for 30, 60, or 90 days, but long-term treatment options are also available for those who require extended care. At SCRC, our team works with you to determine the appropriate length of time for your treatment.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-1134" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="4" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-1134" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">How can I ensure privacy during my treatment in Southern California?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-1134" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="4" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-1134"><p>All reputable treatment centers in Southern California uphold strict confidentiality rules in compliance with HIPAA laws, ensuring your privacy throughout your recovery journey—SCRC included. We take privacy and confidentiality incredibly seriously: breaking that confidentiality is against the law and against our values.</p><p>As a general rule, you should always make sure to discuss privacy concerns with your chosen treatment center for more detailed information.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-1135" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="5" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-1135" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">What aftercare options are available post-treatment in Southern California?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-1135" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="5" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-1135"><p>Even after your treatment journey, your sobriety will still have its challenges. A responsible treatment center will always provide ongoing therapy, support groups, sober living homes, and alumni programs for those who have “graduated.” Toward the end of your treatment, you’ll meet with a counselor to help you find the right options for you.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-1136" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="6" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-1136" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">Can families be involved in the treatment process in Southern  California Centers?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-1136" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="6" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-1136"><p>Since family-of-origin issues tend to be bound up with issues of recovery, most treatment centers actually encourage family involvement. Alcoholism is a family disease, so getting a client’s support system involved in treatment can significantly impact their recovery. Family therapy sessions and educational programs are often part of treatment, helping to mend relationships and rebuild the family’s trust. At SCRC, we encourage family members to attend our family group sessions so everyone can get on the same page and finally start to heal.</p></div>
				</div>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Southern California Recovery Centers

Founded in 2012, SCRC is one of Southern California’s most established and trusted treatment centers.

Reach Out Today

 

 

Sobriety is Just the Beginning

We've helped thousands of individuals find a new way of life.

What We Treat

 

 

Stunning Facilities

Our locations in Southern California have been designed to create an environment conducive to recovery.

Our Facilities

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Who We Are
 

 

 

 

 
Premier Addictions Rehabilitation in Southern California that’s been helping individuals recover for over a decade. 
 

 

 

 

 
We emphasize vocational and life skills, trauma work, structure, and continuity of care in a refined process that’s helped thousands of incredible people re-enter life and find their purpose.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Read More 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Facilities
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 Carlsbad 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 Cardiff By The Sea 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 Dana Point 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Why Choose SCRC? 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Life Skills
 

 

 

 

 
Sobriety is just the start. We provide vocational training and the life skills to process anything that comes up in sobriety.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Trauma
 

 

 

 

 
Excellent trauma work is rare in men’s recovery. We provide EMDR, Seeking Safety Therapy, and Somatic Experiencing.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Structure
 

 

 

 

 
We help clients build accountability through responsibility and structured daily living, ultimately helping them to achieve their goals post-treatment.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Under One Roof
 

 

 

 

 
We don’t outsource our therapists. We work with our own acclaimed in-house treatment team for the continuity of care.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Start Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Drug Treatment
 

 

 

 

 
 At Southern California Recovery Centers, we offer compassionate, personalized drug treatment programs designed to address the unique challenges and circumstances of each client. 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Drug Treatment 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Alcohol Treatment
 

 

 

 

 
 Our specialized alcohol treatment services focus on holistic recovery and personal empowerment, setting you on the path to lasting sobriety. 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Alcohol Treatment 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
We make the insurance process easy
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Our admissions staff works with insurance providers to get as much of your treatment covered as possible. 
We can act as a liaison between you and your provider.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Alumni
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 I can honestly say SCRC saved my life. 4 years of sobriety later, I am enrolled in school to work in the same field as the guys at SCRC that helped me to get sober. None of this would be possible without angels like Cliff, Thurman, Rachel, Tim and too many more to count. If taking your life back into your own hands sounds like something that would interest you, I highly suggest giving these professionals a call. 

 

 

 -J, SCRC Alum 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 I have SCRC to thank for filling my life with hope, love and sobriety. The staff at SCRC provided me with the many tools and opportunities I needed to take back my life and to grow as a man living in recovery. Hands down the best long term recovery program I have been to and I have unfortunately experienced many. Not only did I take back my life, but was given the opportunity through SCRC and their community to blossom into an entire better version of me that I didn’t even think possible. 

 

 

 –Ben, SCRC Alum 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 I’m eternally grateful for my experience at SCRC and for everyone there that helped me along the way. The staff truly cares about helping each client achieve freedom from alcoholism/addiction. 

 

 

 –Elijah, SCRC Alum 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Recovery Begins at SCRC
 

 

 

 

 
If you or your loved one is in need of drug or alcohol rehab, contact us today to speak with our admissions team.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Ready to start your life?
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Contact us today for a completely confidential conversation.
We’ll help you navigate insurance and logistics so you can focus on recovery.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 Email 
 

This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged.

 Name * 
 

 Email * 

 
 

 Phone Number 
 

 Subject 
 

 Message 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Frequently Asked Questions
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 What types of treatment programs for drug and alcohol addiction are typically offered in Southern California? 
 

 

 Treatment types generally fall into one of these categories: 
 
Detox

Residential Inpatient

Intensive Outpatient

Partial Hospitalization

Sober Living

[And more…]
 
At SCRC, we do it all. Our programs incorporate evidence-based therapies like CBT and DBT, holistic wellness approaches like Nutrition and Yoga, and 12-step support groups.

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 What should I look for in a good drug and alcohol treatment center in Southern California? 
 

 

Here are the top things to look out for:
 
First and foremost, it’s crucial that the treatment center you choose be fully accredited with the Joint Commission and DHCS.

Once you’ve confirmed that, browse their Staff or About Us page to see the qualifications and clinical background of the decision-makers and team.

Research the treatment modalities they offer (ideally, they should offer a wide range, and the modalities should be relevant to your situation).

Do some research on their Location. Would you enjoy spending time there?

Make sure they offer personalized treatment plans for every patient, and that they don’t take a dogmatic, one-size-fits-all approach.

Finally, take a look at their aftercare, or post-treatment support, and make sure they offer sober living and alumni options.
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 How long do drug and alcohol treatment programs typically last in Southern California? 
 

 

The length of your stay can vary, depending on your needs and the severity of your condition. Clients commonly stay for 30, 60, or 90 days, but long-term treatment options are also available for those who require extended care. At SCRC, our team works with you to determine the appropriate length of time for your treatment.

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 How can I ensure privacy during my treatment in Southern California? 
 

 

All reputable treatment centers in Southern California uphold strict confidentiality rules in compliance with HIPAA laws, ensuring your privacy throughout your recovery journey—SCRC included. We take privacy and confidentiality incredibly seriously: breaking that confidentiality is against the law and against our values.

As a general rule, you should always make sure to discuss privacy concerns with your chosen treatment center for more detailed information.

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 What aftercare options are available post-treatment in Southern California? 
 

 

Even after your treatment journey, your sobriety will still have its challenges. A responsible treatment center will always provide ongoing therapy, support groups, sober living homes, and alumni programs for those who have “graduated.” Toward the end of your treatment, you’ll meet with a counselor to help you find the right options for you.

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 Can families be involved in the treatment process in Southern California Centers? 
 

 

Since family-of-origin issues tend to be bound up with issues of recovery, most treatment centers actually encourage family involvement. Alcoholism is a family disease, so getting a client’s support system involved in treatment can significantly impact their recovery. Family therapy sessions and educational programs are often part of treatment, helping to mend relationships and rebuild the family’s trust. At SCRC, we encourage family members to attend our family group sessions so everyone can get on the same page and finally start to heal.

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
34249 Camino Capistrano, Dana Point, CA 92624
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552

						<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-2d8f8879 elementor-section-height-min-height elementor-section-items-stretch elementor-section-stretched elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default" data-id="2d8f8879" data-element_type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic","stretch_section":"section-stretched"}">
							<div data-rocket-location-hash="9bb5569590c8472c17936a1a153c7d0a" class="elementor-background-overlay"></div>
							<div data-rocket-location-hash="d31440aa942a444a69cb42ee50b0dfd2" class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-no">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-64cb4beb" data-id="64cb4beb" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-22510747 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="22510747" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h1 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default"><span class="h1-smalltext block">Rehab and Addiction Treatment with GEHA Coverage in Southern California: </span>
The Path to Recovery</h1>				</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-b63c06f elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-stretched elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="b63c06f" data-element_type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic","stretch_section":"section-stretched"}">
						<div data-rocket-location-hash="a300110931994dff244f7ebcfd7c94dd" class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-no">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-8422410" data-id="8422410" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-e7374da elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="e7374da" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-60b034e" data-id="60b034e" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-b8120ec elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="b8120ec" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Addiction is a multifaceted challenge that tests the resilience of the human spirit.</h4>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-16c8ef9 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="16c8ef9" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>For those navigating the tumultuous waves of drug or alcohol dependency, the path to recovery may appear convoluted and overwhelming. </p><p>However, if you or a loved one are grappling with addiction and covered by Government Employees Health Association (GEHA) insurance, a beacon of hope shines brightly. At Southern California Recovery Centers (SCRC), we strive to illuminate your journey towards recovery, helping you regain control over your life.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-a115cd7 elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-stretched elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="a115cd7" data-element_type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic","stretch_section":"section-stretched"}">
						<div data-rocket-location-hash="24bebd414c07cc17069ac99df740012e" class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-no">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-4a4a0f1" data-id="4a4a0f1" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-205cc79 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="205cc79" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-972f4ff" data-id="972f4ff" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a30ec42 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="a30ec42" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Understanding Addiction Treatment</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0182d66 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="0182d66" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Addiction, a complex issue, is characterized by compulsive substance use despite harmful consequences. Its adverse effects seep into all facets of an individual’s life, affecting physical health, mental wellbeing, relationships, and professional pursuits. Effective addiction treatment must be multifaceted, addressing not only the physical aspects of dependency but also the psychological, social, and vocational repercussions.</p><p>Rehabilitation programs aim to provide structured environments that aid individuals in developing healthier coping strategies, repairing relationships, and fostering the skills needed for long-term sobriety. At SCRC, a GEHA rehab facility, our specialized programs offer evidence-based therapies and holistic treatment modalities that cater to the unique needs of each client.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>

			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Detoxification</h4>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-b98ea71 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="b98ea71" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Detoxification is often the first step in the recovery journey, cleansing the body of harmful substances. At SCRC, our medically-supervised detox program ensures safety and comfort during withdrawal. Our collaborative relationship with GEHA often covers the costs associated with this critical phase.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
				<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-3363f18" data-id="3363f18" data-element_type="column">

						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4f4d798 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="4f4d798" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Outpatient and Inpatient Treatment</h4>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-f8d8250 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="f8d8250" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Depending on the severity of the addiction, outpatient or inpatient treatment may be recommended. Outpatient treatment allows individuals to receive therapy and support while living at home, whereas inpatient treatment provides round-the-clock care in a residential setting. GEHA generally covers both options, offering flexibility to suit individual needs.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>

						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-83e3647 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="83e3647" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Partial Hospitalization Programs</h4>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-f3f015c elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="f3f015c" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Partial hospitalization programs (PHP) are intensive outpatient treatments that provide a high level of care without overnight stays. Clients participating in PHPs often benefit from structured therapy sessions while maintaining some aspects of their daily routine. These programs are frequently covered by drug rehab GEHA insurance.</p><p> </p>								</div>

									<p>Recovery doesn’t end when the initial treatment concludes. Aftercare planning helps to prevent relapse and promotes long-term sobriety. As part of our commitment to sustainable recovery, SCRC offers comprehensive aftercare planning, often covered under GEHA plans.</p><p> </p>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>SCRC sets itself apart through our unwavering commitment to personalized, holistic care. We understand that addiction is not a one-size-fits-all problem, so we reject the one-size-fits-all solution. Instead, our certified professionals meticulously craft individualized treatment plans that address the unique needs and challenges of each client.</p><p>We combine evidence-based therapies with holistic modalities like yoga, meditation, and art therapy to promote healing of the mind, body, and spirit. Additionally, our serene Southern California locations offer a tranquil and supportive environment that fosters recovery. </p><p>At SCRC, we don’t just treat addiction; we empower individuals to reclaim their lives, providing tools and strategies for sustainable, long-term sobriety. That is the SCRC difference.</p>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>At SCRC, we aim to make the admissions process as straightforward and stress-free as possible. We understand that taking the first step towards recovery can be daunting, so our dedicated admissions team is here to guide you. </p><p>The process begins with a confidential assessment, where we learn about your history, understand your specific needs, and answer any questions you may have. Once all these steps are complete, you can begin your journey towards recovery with confidence.</p>								</div>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

 Rehab and Addiction Treatment with GEHA Coverage in Southern California: 
The Path to Recovery
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Addiction is a multifaceted challenge that tests the resilience of the human spirit.
 

 

 

 

 
For those navigating the tumultuous waves of drug or alcohol dependency, the path to recovery may appear convoluted and overwhelming. 

However, if you or a loved one are grappling with addiction and covered by Government Employees Health Association (GEHA) insurance, a beacon of hope shines brightly. At Southern California Recovery Centers (SCRC), we strive to illuminate your journey towards recovery, helping you regain control over your life.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Understanding Addiction Treatment
 

 

 

 

 
Addiction, a complex issue, is characterized by compulsive substance use despite harmful consequences. Its adverse effects seep into all facets of an individual’s life, affecting physical health, mental wellbeing, relationships, and professional pursuits. Effective addiction treatment must be multifaceted, addressing not only the physical aspects of dependency but also the psychological, social, and vocational repercussions.

Rehabilitation programs aim to provide structured environments that aid individuals in developing healthier coping strategies, repairing relationships, and fostering the skills needed for long-term sobriety. At SCRC, a GEHA rehab facility, our specialized programs offer evidence-based therapies and holistic treatment modalities that cater to the unique needs of each client.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Does GEHA Cover Rehab?
 

 

 

 

 
Coming from one of the country’s most comprehensive health plans, GEHA rehab plans offer extensive coverage for substance use disorder treatment, which includes rehabilitation.

Whether you require inpatient or outpatient care, detoxification, partial hospitalization programs, or aftercare, GEHA rehab coverage is designed to support your journey to recovery. The specific details and extent of GEHA addiction treatment coverage can vary based on individual plans, so it’s crucial to explore your policy thoroughly to understand its benefits and limitations.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
GEHA Coverage for Addiction Treatment
 

 

 

 

 
GEHA, one of the largest self-insured health plans in the United States, provides robust coverage for substance abuse treatment. Their commitment to the well-being of their members includes comprehensive support for addiction recovery. As a GEHA member, you can access a range of essential services, including detoxification, outpatient and inpatient treatment, partial hospitalization programs, and aftercare planning.

The extent of GEHA’s coverage varies depending on the specifics of the policyholder’s plan. However, GEHA consistently emphasizes the importance of substance use disorder treatment, recognizing it as a critical component of health care. Therefore, it’s crucial to explore your specific plan’s benefits, limitations, and requirements to maximize your coverage.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers: Your Partner in Recovery
 

 

 

 

 
SCRC stands as a beacon of hope for individuals wrestling with addiction. With a team of certified professionals and a serene, supportive environment conducive to healing, we provide the highest level of care for our clients.

Our strategic partnership with GEHA health plans’ insurance rehab coverage allows us to extend our comprehensive, personalized treatment plans to more individuals seeking liberation from the shackles of addiction.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California’s Premier Outpatient Addiction Recovery Center
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Benefits of Attending an Addiction Treatment Center in Southern California
 

 

 

 

 
Southern California offers an idyllic setting for those seeking respite from the strains of addiction. The region’s temperate climate and abundant natural beauty have a calming effect, promoting relaxation and mindfulness—key components of recovery. 

Attending an addiction treatment center in Southern California, such as SCRC, also provides exposure to a diverse, supportive community of individuals who share the goal of sobriety. The cultural richness of Southern California, combined with the area’s emphasis on wellness and self-care, makes it an ideal backdrop for transformative healing. 

This unique environment, paired with our holistic and personalized approach to addiction treatment, empowers individuals to build healthier, substance-free lives.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Substance Abuse & Addiction Treatment Options at Southern California Recovery Centers
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Detoxification
 

 

 

 

 
Detoxification is often the first step in the recovery journey, cleansing the body of harmful substances. At SCRC, our medically-supervised detox program ensures safety and comfort during withdrawal. Our collaborative relationship with GEHA often covers the costs associated with this critical phase.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Outpatient and Inpatient Treatment
 

 

 

 

 
Depending on the severity of the addiction, outpatient or inpatient treatment may be recommended. Outpatient treatment allows individuals to receive therapy and support while living at home, whereas inpatient treatment provides round-the-clock care in a residential setting. GEHA generally covers both options, offering flexibility to suit individual needs.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Partial Hospitalization Programs
 

 

 

 

 
Partial hospitalization programs (PHP) are intensive outpatient treatments that provide a high level of care without overnight stays. Clients participating in PHPs often benefit from structured therapy sessions while maintaining some aspects of their daily routine. These programs are frequently covered by drug rehab GEHA insurance.

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Aftercare Planning
 

 

 

 

 
Recovery doesn’t end when the initial treatment concludes. Aftercare planning helps to prevent relapse and promotes long-term sobriety. As part of our commitment to sustainable recovery, SCRC offers comprehensive aftercare planning, often covered under GEHA plans.

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Locations
 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers boasts several serene, state-of-the-art facilities scattered across Southern California’s picturesque landscape. 

Our locations are carefully selected to provide a tranquil, supportive environment that fosters healing and growth. Each facility is equipped with modern amenities and comfortable accommodations, ensuring your stay is as pleasant as possible. 

Whether you are walking along the beach, exploring lush gardens, or relaxing in your room, SCRC strives to create an atmosphere where recovery can thrive.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
What Makes SCRC Different?
 

 

 

 

 
SCRC sets itself apart through our unwavering commitment to personalized, holistic care. We understand that addiction is not a one-size-fits-all problem, so we reject the one-size-fits-all solution. Instead, our certified professionals meticulously craft individualized treatment plans that address the unique needs and challenges of each client.

We combine evidence-based therapies with holistic modalities like yoga, meditation, and art therapy to promote healing of the mind, body, and spirit. Additionally, our serene Southern California locations offer a tranquil and supportive environment that fosters recovery. 

At SCRC, we don’t just treat addiction; we empower individuals to reclaim their lives, providing tools and strategies for sustainable, long-term sobriety. That is the SCRC difference.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Admissions Process
 

 

 

 

 
At SCRC, we aim to make the admissions process as straightforward and stress-free as possible. We understand that taking the first step towards recovery can be daunting, so our dedicated admissions team is here to guide you. 

The process begins with a confidential assessment, where we learn about your history, understand your specific needs, and answer any questions you may have. Following the assessment, our team collaborates with you to develop a personalized treatment plan. 

If you’re a GEHA policyholder, we’ll also assist with insurance verification and provide clarity about your coverage. Once all these steps are complete, you can begin your journey towards recovery with confidence.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Admissions 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Embrace the Journey to Recovery
 

 

 

 

 
For those wrestling with substance dependency, stepping onto the path of recovery can feel like a daunting endeavor. 

However, with the right support system, the journey can lead to profound personal growth and a renewed sense of self-worth. GEHA insurance holders, the comprehensive coverage provided, partnered with the expert, empathetic care at Southern California Recovery Centers, offers a powerful tool in your journey towards liberation from addiction. 

Remember, recovery is not merely about overcoming addiction—it’s about reclaiming your life. Let SCRC be your partner on this life-changing journey. Reach out to us today to begin your path to recovery.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Call Us Today!
 

 

 

 

 
Get the help you or a loved one deserves!
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
34249 Camino Capistrano, Dana Point, CA 92624
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Addiction is a complex disease, characterized by an inability to control substance use despite harmful consequences. </h4>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-623babaf elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="623babaf" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>However, it is important to remember that this affliction is not a moral failure, but a health issue that requires comprehensive and compassionate care. Thankfully, Aetna rehab coverage provides help for those seeking treatment for addiction in California. This article aims to illustrate how you can utilize your Aetna rehab coverage to access high-quality care, and begin your journey towards sobriety and recovery.</p>								</div>

					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Does Aetna Cover Rehab?</h2>				</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5f63cc8f elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="5f63cc8f" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Aetna’s commitment to holistic healthcare extends to coverage for rehabilitation services, including those for substance use disorders. Aetna rehab coverage offers benefits that cater to a broad range of treatment modalities, including detoxification, residential treatment programs, outpatient services, partial hospitalization, and even aftercare support. </p><p>It’s important to note that the extent of Aetna rehab coverage can vary based on the specifics of your individual Aetna plan. To determine the exact parameters of your coverage, reach out to Aetna directly or have the verification process completed by the professionals at your chosen Aetna inpatient rehab center, such as the Southern California Recovery Centers.</p>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>At Southern California Recovery Centers, a comprehensive range of treatment options are offered to suit the unique needs of each client. </p><p>Services at our Aetna alcohol rehab facility include medical detoxification to manage withdrawal symptoms, residential treatment programs that provide round-the-clock care in a supportive environment, and outpatient programs for those who can maintain recovery while living at home. The centers also offer specialized programs such as dual diagnosis treatment for co-occurring mental health conditions, trauma-informed therapy, and family therapy. </p><p>Holistic therapies like yoga, meditation, and nutritional counseling are integrated into treatment plans, addressing the body, mind, and spirit. Each client’s journey is guided by a personalized treatment plan developed and continually reassessed by a multidisciplinary team of addiction specialists, ensuring the most effective path to recovery.</p>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Southern California Recovery Centers boast multiple locations throughout the picturesque Southern California region, providing a serene environment conducive to healing and recovery. </p><p>Each facility offers a unique blend of tranquility and accessibility, nestled within calm residential neighborhoods yet easily reachable from major urban areas. Whether you choose the coastal retreat, set against the backdrop of the Pacific Ocean’s soothing rhythm, or our mountain-view center that offers the tranquility of nature, each location provides a safe and secure space to begin your journey towards sobriety. </p><p>The addresses and specific details of each center can be found on our website, allowing you to choose the location that best suits your preferences and needs.</p>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>It is essential to seek help promptly if you or a loved one struggles with addiction. Delaying treatment can exacerbate the health risks and personal losses associated with substance use disorders. Timely intervention can help prevent these complications and set the stage for a successful recovery.</p><p>Your Aetna insurance is more than just a policy—it’s a lifeline to a healthier future. By leveraging your Aetna coverage, you can access SCRC’s top-tier services and take a vital step towards reclaiming your life.</p>								</div>

					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Our Admissions Process</h2>				</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-7781b4a9 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="7781b4a9" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>The admissions process at Southern California Recovery Centers is designed to be as seamless and stress-free as possible. </p><p>The journey begins with a confidential phone consultation with one of our knowledgeable intake specialists. During this initial interaction, we gather essential information about your history, the nature of your addiction, and any co-occurring mental health conditions. </p><p>Next, we verify your insurance benefits, including Aetna coverage, and discuss any out-of-pocket costs you might expect. Once your admission is confirmed, our team will guide you through the next steps, which may include a medical evaluation, psychological assessment, and personalized treatment planning. </p><p>Our goal is to ensure you feel supported and informed from the moment you reach out to us, through your admission, and beyond into your recovery journey.</p>								</div>
				</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Navigating the road to recovery from substance abuse can be challenging, but it’s crucial to remember that you don’t have to do it alone. </p><p>By utilizing your Aetna insurance coverage, you can access the high-quality care available at Southern California Recovery Centers. In this welcoming and healing environment, you will find comprehensive and compassionate treatment designed to address the unique facets of your addiction.</p><p>Don’t let the fear of costs deter you from seeking the care you deserve. Your Aetna insurance is there to support you on your path to recovery. The first step towards a healthier, sober life starts with reaching out for help. </p><p>Contact Southern California Recovery Centers today to learn more about how your Aetna insurance coverage can provide you with the resources you need to conquer addiction and reclaim your life.</p>								</div>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Aetna Rehab & Addiction Treatment Coverage at 
Southern California Recovery Centers
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Addiction is a complex disease, characterized by an inability to control substance use despite harmful consequences. 
 

 

 

 

 
However, it is important to remember that this affliction is not a moral failure, but a health issue that requires comprehensive and compassionate care. Thankfully, Aetna rehab coverage provides help for those seeking treatment for addiction in California. This article aims to illustrate how you can utilize your Aetna rehab coverage to access high-quality care, and begin your journey towards sobriety and recovery.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Understanding Addiction

 

 

 

 

 
Addiction weaves its path not only through the life of the individual but also impacts their loved ones, and their communities at large. From psychological turmoil to physical health issues, the implications are far-reaching and multifaceted, necessitating a holistic approach to recovery.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Does Aetna Cover Rehab?
 

 

 

 

 
Aetna’s commitment to holistic healthcare extends to coverage for rehabilitation services, including those for substance use disorders. Aetna rehab coverage offers benefits that cater to a broad range of treatment modalities, including detoxification, residential treatment programs, outpatient services, partial hospitalization, and even aftercare support. 

It’s important to note that the extent of Aetna rehab coverage can vary based on the specifics of your individual Aetna plan. To determine the exact parameters of your coverage, reach out to Aetna directly or have the verification process completed by the professionals at your chosen Aetna inpatient rehab center, such as the Southern California Recovery Centers.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Aetna Insurance and Substance Use Disorders
 

 

 

 

 
Aetna, one of the country’s leading health insurance providers, acknowledges the severity of substance use disorders and their impact on overall health. As part of their commitment to comprehensive care, Aetna offers coverage for a broad spectrum of addiction treatments, including detoxification, residential treatment, outpatient services, and more.

With a robust network mental health care providers, Aetna addiction treatment has aligned itself with numerous premier treatment centers, including the Southern California Recovery Centers, to ensure its members have access to the high-quality care they deserve.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers: The Pathway to Recovery
 

 

 

 

 
The Southern California Recovery Centers (SCRC) are renowned for their pioneering approach to addiction treatment. Our Aetna drug rehab center offers a tranquil, supportive environment coupled with personalized treatment plans designed to address each individual’s unique needs.

The clinical team at SCRC includes highly skilled therapists, addiction specialists, and medical professionals. Together, they provide an integrated approach to recovery that includes evidence-based therapies, holistic care, individual and group counseling, family involvement, and essential aftercare planning.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California’s Premier Outpatient Addiction Recovery Center
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Substance Abuse & Addiction Treatment Options at Southern California Recovery Centers
 

 

 

 

 
At Southern California Recovery Centers, a comprehensive range of treatment options are offered to suit the unique needs of each client. 

Services at our Aetna alcohol rehab facility include medical detoxification to manage withdrawal symptoms, residential treatment programs that provide round-the-clock care in a supportive environment, and outpatient programs for those who can maintain recovery while living at home. The centers also offer specialized programs such as dual diagnosis treatment for co-occurring mental health conditions, trauma-informed therapy, and family therapy. 

Holistic therapies like yoga, meditation, and nutritional counseling are integrated into treatment plans, addressing the body, mind, and spirit. Each client’s journey is guided by a personalized treatment plan developed and continually reassessed by a multidisciplinary team of addiction specialists, ensuring the most effective path to recovery.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Locations
 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers boast multiple locations throughout the picturesque Southern California region, providing a serene environment conducive to healing and recovery. 

Each facility offers a unique blend of tranquility and accessibility, nestled within calm residential neighborhoods yet easily reachable from major urban areas. Whether you choose the coastal retreat, set against the backdrop of the Pacific Ocean’s soothing rhythm, or our mountain-view center that offers the tranquility of nature, each location provides a safe and secure space to begin your journey towards sobriety. 

The addresses and specific details of each center can be found on our website, allowing you to choose the location that best suits your preferences and needs.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
The Value of Getting Treatment
 

 

 

 

 
It is essential to seek help promptly if you or a loved one struggles with addiction. Delaying treatment can exacerbate the health risks and personal losses associated with substance use disorders. Timely intervention can help prevent these complications and set the stage for a successful recovery.

Your Aetna insurance is more than just a policy—it’s a lifeline to a healthier future. By leveraging your Aetna coverage, you can access SCRC’s top-tier services and take a vital step towards reclaiming your life.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Admissions Process
 

 

 

 

 
The admissions process at Southern California Recovery Centers is designed to be as seamless and stress-free as possible. 

The journey begins with a confidential phone consultation with one of our knowledgeable intake specialists. During this initial interaction, we gather essential information about your history, the nature of your addiction, and any co-occurring mental health conditions. 

Next, we verify your insurance benefits, including Aetna coverage, and discuss any out-of-pocket costs you might expect. Once your admission is confirmed, our team will guide you through the next steps, which may include a medical evaluation, psychological assessment, and personalized treatment planning. 

Our goal is to ensure you feel supported and informed from the moment you reach out to us, through your admission, and beyond into your recovery journey.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Admissions 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Start Your Road to Recovery Today
 

 

 

 

 
Navigating the road to recovery from substance abuse can be challenging, but it’s crucial to remember that you don’t have to do it alone. 

By utilizing your Aetna insurance coverage, you can access the high-quality care available at Southern California Recovery Centers. In this welcoming and healing environment, you will find comprehensive and compassionate treatment designed to address the unique facets of your addiction.

Don’t let the fear of costs deter you from seeking the care you deserve. Your Aetna insurance is there to support you on your path to recovery. The first step towards a healthier, sober life starts with reaching out for help. 

Contact Southern California Recovery Centers today to learn more about how your Aetna insurance coverage can provide you with the resources you need to conquer addiction and reclaim your life.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Call Us Today!
 

 

 

 

 
Get the help you or a loved one deserves!
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
34249 Camino Capistrano, Dana Point, CA 92624

				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-20489228 elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-stretched elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="20489228" data-element_type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic","stretch_section":"section-stretched"}">

						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-2835e47f elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="2835e47f" data-element_type="section">
						<div  class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-2af8259a" data-id="2af8259a" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2dfd2e35 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2dfd2e35" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p style="text-align: left;">According to the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA), 46.3 million people met the criteria for a substance use disorder in 2021.​ Despite this, only a small fraction of those affected receive adequate treatment. At Southern California Recovery Centers (SCRC), we’re here to change that. </p><p style="text-align: left;">Starting the journey to recovery often begins with one crucial step: detox. Our drug detox centers are dedicated to providing you with a supportive and medically supervised environment, ensuring the first phase of your recovery is both safe and transformative. Our specialized drug detox centers, programs, and treatments provide a safe and nurturing environment designed to support individuals through every step of their detox journey.</p>								</div>
				</div>

		</div>

						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-cca547a elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="cca547a" data-element_type="section">

			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-15eb649e elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="15eb649e" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">What is Drug Detox?
</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-28c5ba5b elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="28c5ba5b" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Drug detox is the initial stage of addiction treatment, aimed at clearing the body of toxins accumulated due to drug abuse. This medically supervised process is crucial as it manages the acute physical symptoms of withdrawal that occur when a person stops taking drugs. Our drug detox center is equipped with highly trained medical professionals who provide care and support, ensuring safety throughout the detoxification process.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>

			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-626c82b3 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="626c82b3" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-3c960376" data-id="3c960376" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-601a65ae elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="601a65ae" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">When is Drug Detox Necessary?


</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-731cfb19 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="731cfb19" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Drug detox becomes necessary when an individual’s dependency on substances impacts their physical health, mental well-being, and quality of life. It is particularly crucial for those who face significant withdrawal symptoms, which can be potentially life-threatening without proper medical supervision. At SCRC, our drug detox programs are tailored to address the unique needs of each client, providing the necessary support to begin recovery on solid ground.</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-09e4d9a elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="09e4d9a" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">The Drug Detox Process


</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c855749 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="c855749" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>The drug detox process at SCRC, one of the <a href="https://lajolla.com/article/san-diego-drug-rehab-centers/">top rated treatment centers</a> in San Diego, involves several steps designed to ensure the most effective and comfortable recovery experience. First, a comprehensive assessment is conducted to design a personalized detox plan. This is followed by the detox phase, where medical intervention is provided to manage withdrawal symptoms. Continuous monitoring and support help maintain the individual’s stability as they progress toward drug-free living.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>

						<div  class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-no">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-c5df29d" data-id="c5df29d" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-d60bdac elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="d60bdac" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">

						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-ab64c83 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="ab64c83" data-element_type="section">

						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0555a8e elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="0555a8e" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Why You Should Not Detox From Drugs At Home



</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-76b8235 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="76b8235" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>SCRC’s drug detox facilities provide a controlled environment with professional support to handle any emergencies and reduce the risk of relapse. Here are a few reasons why detoxing from drugs at home is more risky than being in a detox facility:</p><ol><li aria-level="1"><b>Withdrawal Complications: </b>Detoxing from substances like alcohol, opioids, and benzodiazepines can cause severe withdrawal symptoms that can be medically dangerous. Symptoms might include severe anxiety, physical shaking, heart palpitations, and in extreme cases, life-threatening conditions like seizures or delirium tremens (in the case of alcohol). These symptoms require professional medical management to ensure safety.</li><li aria-level="1"><b>Lack of Medical Supervision: </b>At home, you won’t have access to medical care that can manage and alleviate withdrawal symptoms safely. Medical professionals in a detox facility can provide medications and support to reduce withdrawal symptoms and complications.</li><li aria-level="1"><b>Psychological Support:</b> Withdrawal can also be emotionally and psychologically challenging. Professional detox facilities provide psychological support and counseling, which are crucial for addressing the underlying issues related to addiction.</li><li aria-level="1"><b>Risk of Relapse: </b>The discomfort and stress of withdrawal can increase the risk of relapse. In a detox facility, the environment is controlled to remove access to addictive substances, reducing the chance of relapse during the detox phase.</li><li aria-level="1"><b>Co-occurring Conditions: </b>Co-occurring mental health conditions are common among those with SUDs, with 37.9% of adults with a substance use disorder also having a mental illness. Professional detox programs are equipped to diagnose and treat these concurrent conditions, which might be overlooked or inadequately managed at home.</li></ol>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-53c8174 elementor-testimonial--align-left elementor-testimonial--skin-default elementor-testimonial--layout-image_inline elementor-widget elementor-widget-testimonial-carousel" data-id="53c8174" data-element_type="widget" data-settings="{"slides_per_view":"2","slides_per_view_laptop":"2","speed":500,"autoplay":"yes","autoplay_speed":5000,"loop":"yes","pause_on_hover":"yes","pause_on_interaction":"yes","space_between":{"unit":"px","size":10,"sizes":[]},"space_between_laptop":{"unit":"px","size":10,"sizes":[]},"space_between_tablet":{"unit":"px","size":10,"sizes":[]},"space_between_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":10,"sizes":[]}}" data-widget_type="testimonial-carousel.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">

			<div class="elementor-main-swiper swiper-container">
				<div class="swiper-wrapper">
											<div class="swiper-slide">
									<div class="elementor-testimonial">
							<div class="elementor-testimonial__content">
					<div class="elementor-testimonial__text">
						I can honestly say SCRC saved my life. 4 years of sobriety later, I am enrolled in school to work in the same field as the guys at  SCRC that helped me to get sober. None of this would be possible without angels like Cliff, Thurman, Rachel, Tim and too many more to count. If taking your life back into your own hands sounds like something that would interest you, I highly suggest giving  these professionals a call.					</div>
									</div>
						<div class="elementor-testimonial__footer">
								<cite class="elementor-testimonial__cite"><span class="elementor-testimonial__name">–J, SCRC Alum</span></cite>			</div>
		</div>
								</div>
											<div class="swiper-slide">
									<div class="elementor-testimonial">
							<div class="elementor-testimonial__content">
					<div class="elementor-testimonial__text">
						I have SCRC to thank for filling my life with hope, love and sobriety. The staff at SCRC provided me with the many tools and opportunities I needed to take back my life and to grow as a man living in recovery.  Hands down the best long term recovery program I have been to and I have unfortunately experienced many.  Not only did I take back my life, but was given the opportunity through SCRC and their community to blossom into an entire better version of me that I didn’t even think possible.					</div>
