						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-096d841 nomargin elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="096d841" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Frequently Asked Questions About Drug Detox

</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1739df4 elementor-widget-divider--view-line elementor-widget elementor-widget-divider" data-id="1739df4" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="divider.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-divider">
			<span class="elementor-divider-separator">
						</span>
		</div>
						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1c30ccd faq-accord elementor-widget elementor-widget-accordion" data-id="1c30ccd" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="accordion.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-accordion">
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-2951" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="1" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-2951" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">Is drug detox safe?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2951" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="1" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2951"><p>Drug detox can be risky if attempted without proper medical oversight, due to the potential for severe withdrawal symptoms and complications. It’s generally safe when conducted under the supervision of medical professionals in a controlled environment. At SCRC, safety is our top priority, and every detox program is tailored to the individual’s specific health needs. Our medical teams are equipped with the expertise to manage withdrawal symptoms effectively and address any complications that may arise during detox. </p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-2952" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="2" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-2952" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">What is the cost for drug detox?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2952" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="2" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2952"><p>The cost of drug detox varies widely depending on several factors, including the type of program, the duration of drug detox treatment, and the level of medical care required. Many facilities, including SCRC, offer various financing options and can provide guidance on the expected costs based on the personalized treatment plan.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-2953" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="3" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-2953" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">Does insurance cover drug detox?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2953" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="3" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2953"><p>Many insurance plans cover drug detox, at least partially, as it is recognized as a necessary medical treatment for addiction recovery. Coverage details, however, can vary significantly between different insurers and policies. At SCRC, we work with several insurance providers and can help clients navigate their insurance benefits to determine what level of detox and subsequent treatment is covered. Clients are encouraged to check directly with their insurance provider to understand the specifics of their coverage.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-2954" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="4" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-2954" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">What happens after drug detox?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2954" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="4" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2954"><p>After completing drug detox, the next step typically involves transitioning to further addiction treatment programs, which can include residential therapy, partial hospitalization, or outpatient services. These programs focus on psychological recovery, helping individuals address the underlying issues that led to addiction through therapy, counseling, and support groups. Continuing care is crucial for long-term recovery, as detox alone often does not address the behavioral, social, and psychological aspects of addiction.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-2955" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="5" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-2955" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">Who is involved in the drug detox process?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2955" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="5" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2955"><p>A multidisciplinary team is involved in the drug detox process to ensure comprehensive care. This team typically includes physicians specialized in addiction medicine, nurses, psychologists, psychiatrists, therapists, and social workers. Each professional plays a critical role in providing medical monitoring, psychological support, and crafting a continuum of care post-detox. Their combined expertise helps manage the physical and emotional challenges during detox and prepares the individual for the next steps in recovery.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-accordion-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-2956" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="6" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-2956" aria-expanded="false">
													<span class="elementor-accordion-icon elementor-accordion-icon-right" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,13.5l6,6,6-6" transform="translate(3 2.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-accordion-icon-opened"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="Down" width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><g id="Circle" fill="none" stroke="#b7b5b1" stroke-width="1"><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" stroke="none"></circle><circle cx="18" cy="18" r="17.5" fill="none"></circle></g><path id="v" d="M9,19.5l6-6,6,6" transform="translate(3 0.5)" fill="none" stroke="#fcb426" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></span>
														</span>
												<a class="elementor-accordion-title" tabindex="0">What is rapid detox?</a>
					</div>
					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2956" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="6" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2956"><p>Rapid detox is a method of detoxification that speeds up the process of eliminating drugs from the body. Under general anesthesia, medications are administered to precipitate withdrawal, aiming to complete the detox process quickly, often within hours. While this method might appeal due to its speed, it is controversial and can carry significant risks, including complications from anesthesia and a higher potential for acute withdrawal symptoms. It is generally recommended to opt for a more gradual, medically supervised detox process to ensure safety and effectiveness.</p></div>
				</div>
								</div>
						</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

 Drug Detox
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
According to the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA), 46.3 million people met the criteria for a substance use disorder in 2021.​ Despite this, only a small fraction of those affected receive adequate treatment. At Southern California Recovery Centers (SCRC), we’re here to change that. 

Starting the journey to recovery often begins with one crucial step: detox. Our drug detox centers are dedicated to providing you with a supportive and medically supervised environment, ensuring the first phase of your recovery is both safe and transformative. Our specialized drug detox centers, programs, and treatments provide a safe and nurturing environment designed to support individuals through every step of their detox journey.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Table of Contents 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
What is Drug Detox?

 

 

 

 

 
Drug detox is the initial stage of addiction treatment, aimed at clearing the body of toxins accumulated due to drug abuse. This medically supervised process is crucial as it manages the acute physical symptoms of withdrawal that occur when a person stops taking drugs. Our drug detox center is equipped with highly trained medical professionals who provide care and support, ensuring safety throughout the detoxification process.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
When is Drug Detox Necessary?

 

 

 

 

 
Drug detox becomes necessary when an individual’s dependency on substances impacts their physical health, mental well-being, and quality of life. It is particularly crucial for those who face significant withdrawal symptoms, which can be potentially life-threatening without proper medical supervision. At SCRC, our drug detox programs are tailored to address the unique needs of each client, providing the necessary support to begin recovery on solid ground.
 

 

 

 

 
The Drug Detox Process

 

 

 

 

 
The drug detox process at SCRC, one of the top rated treatment centers in San Diego, involves several steps designed to ensure the most effective and comfortable recovery experience. First, a comprehensive assessment is conducted to design a personalized detox plan. This is followed by the detox phase, where medical intervention is provided to manage withdrawal symptoms. Continuous monitoring and support help maintain the individual’s stability as they progress toward drug-free living.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Are There Different Types of Drug Detox?

 

 

 

 

 
Drug detox programs will differ depending on the substance used and the individual’s specific needs. Each program is designed by our team based on the severity of addiction and the level of medical care required. SCRC offers a range of detox options to best suit the needs of our clients.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
How Long Does It Take To Detox From Drugs?

 

 

 

 

 
The duration of drug detox varies depending on the type of drug used, the extent of addiction, and the individual’s physical health. Typically, detox can last from a few days to several weeks. At SCRC, our medical team provides an estimated timeline and customizes detox programs to optimize recovery time without compromising safety.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
What Happens When You Detox From Drugs?

 

 

 

 

 
Detoxing from drugs triggers withdrawal symptoms that can range from mild to severe, including anxiety, sleep disturbances, physical pain, and cravings. Throughout the detox process at SCRC, our healthcare professionals support the clients, using various drug detox treatments to ease symptoms and facilitate a smoother detoxification. We ensure your detox is as safe and comfortable as possible, thereby reducing the risk of relapse. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
What Are The Side Effects of Drug Detox?

 

 

 

 

 
While detox is a vital step toward recovery, it can come with side effects such as nausea, mood swings, irritability, and fatigue. At SCRC, we are committed to minimizing these side effects through medical supervision and supportive care, ensuring a more comfortable detox experience.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Why You Should Not Detox From Drugs At Home

 

 

 

 

 
SCRC’s drug detox facilities provide a controlled environment with professional support to handle any emergencies and reduce the risk of relapse. Here are a few reasons why detoxing from drugs at home is more risky than being in a detox facility:
 
 Withdrawal Complications: Detoxing from substances like alcohol, opioids, and benzodiazepines can cause severe withdrawal symptoms that can be medically dangerous. Symptoms might include severe anxiety, physical shaking, heart palpitations, and in extreme cases, life-threatening conditions like seizures or delirium tremens (in the case of alcohol). These symptoms require professional medical management to ensure safety.

 Lack of Medical Supervision: At home, you won’t have access to medical care that can manage and alleviate withdrawal symptoms safely. Medical professionals in a detox facility can provide medications and support to reduce withdrawal symptoms and complications.

 Psychological Support: Withdrawal can also be emotionally and psychologically challenging. Professional detox facilities provide psychological support and counseling, which are crucial for addressing the underlying issues related to addiction.

 Risk of Relapse: The discomfort and stress of withdrawal can increase the risk of relapse. In a detox facility, the environment is controlled to remove access to addictive substances, reducing the chance of relapse during the detox phase.

 Co-occurring Conditions: Co-occurring mental health conditions are common among those with SUDs, with 37.9% of adults with a substance use disorder also having a mental illness. Professional detox programs are equipped to diagnose and treat these concurrent conditions, which might be overlooked or inadequately managed at home.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Drug Detox Medication

 

 

 

 

 
Can you take medication to alleviate detox symptoms? Yes. 

At SCRC, we use FDA-approved medications to manage withdrawal symptoms and support recovery during the detox phase. These medications help alleviate discomfort, stabilize mood, and prevent potential complications, making the detox process safer and more comfortable.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
The Benefits of Drug Detox

 

 

 

 

 
Detoxing from drugs at SCRC is the first step towards reclaiming control of your life and health. Not only does it help cleanse the body, it also improves mental clarity and emotional stability, setting a solid foundation for further therapeutic interventions. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
The SCRC Difference
 

 

 

 

 
At SCRC, we’ve helped thousands of people find a new way of life. We pride ourselves on providing a compassionate and comprehensive approach to drug detox, with state-of-the-art facilities and a team of dedicated professionals. Our personalized care plans are designed to meet your unique needs, so you can set the stage for a fulfilling life free of substances. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Locations in Southern California

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Drug Detox in San Diego

 

 

 

 

 
SCRC offers comprehensive drug detox services in San Diego. With expert care and beautiful surroundings, we are here to help you begin your journey to recovery.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Learn About Detox in San Diego 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Drug Detox in Orange County

 

 

 

 

 
Our Orange County facility provides top-tier drug detox services. Start your recovery in a supportive environment designed specifically for healing.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Learn About Detox in Orange County 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Begin the Journey to Recovery

 

 

 

 

 
Embarking on the journey to recovery is a brave step. At SCRC, we are ready to support you every step of the way. Our admissions staff works with insurance providers to get as much of your treatment covered as possible. Contact us today for a completely confidential conversation.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Alumni
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 I can honestly say SCRC saved my life. 4 years of sobriety later, I am enrolled in school to work in the same field as the guys at SCRC that helped me to get sober. None of this would be possible without angels like Cliff, Thurman, Rachel, Tim and too many more to count. If taking your life back into your own hands sounds like something that would interest you, I highly suggest giving these professionals a call. 

 

 

 –J, SCRC Alum 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 I have SCRC to thank for filling my life with hope, love and sobriety. The staff at SCRC provided me with the many tools and opportunities I needed to take back my life and to grow as a man living in recovery. Hands down the best long term recovery program I have been to and I have unfortunately experienced many. Not only did I take back my life, but was given the opportunity through SCRC and their community to blossom into an entire better version of me that I didn’t even think possible. 

 

 

 –Ben, SCRC Alum 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 I’m eternally grateful for my experience at SCRC and for everyone there that helped me along the way. The staff truly cares about helping each client achieve freedom from alcoholism/addiction. 

 

 

 –Elijah, SCRC Alum 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Sources

 

 

 

 

 
 U.S. Department of Health and Human Services . (2023). SAMHSA Announces National Survey on Drug Use and Health (NSDUH) Results Detailing Mental Illness and Substance Use Levels in 2021 . 

National Institute on Drug Abuse. (2024). NIDA IC Fact Sheet 2024. 

Addiction Group. (2024). 2024 Addiction Statistics: Accurate Data on Substance Abuse in the US. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Frequently Asked Questions About Drug Detox

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is drug detox safe? 
 

 

Drug detox can be risky if attempted without proper medical oversight, due to the potential for severe withdrawal symptoms and complications. It’s generally safe when conducted under the supervision of medical professionals in a controlled environment. At SCRC, safety is our top priority, and every detox program is tailored to the individual’s specific health needs. Our medical teams are equipped with the expertise to manage withdrawal symptoms effectively and address any complications that may arise during detox. 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the cost for drug detox? 
 

 

The cost of drug detox varies widely depending on several factors, including the type of program, the duration of drug detox treatment, and the level of medical care required. Many facilities, including SCRC, offer various financing options and can provide guidance on the expected costs based on the personalized treatment plan.

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 Does insurance cover drug detox? 
 

 

Many insurance plans cover drug detox, at least partially, as it is recognized as a necessary medical treatment for addiction recovery. Coverage details, however, can vary significantly between different insurers and policies. At SCRC, we work with several insurance providers and can help clients navigate their insurance benefits to determine what level of detox and subsequent treatment is covered. Clients are encouraged to check directly with their insurance provider to understand the specifics of their coverage.

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 What happens after drug detox? 
 

 

After completing drug detox, the next step typically involves transitioning to further addiction treatment programs, which can include residential therapy, partial hospitalization, or outpatient services. These programs focus on psychological recovery, helping individuals address the underlying issues that led to addiction through therapy, counseling, and support groups. Continuing care is crucial for long-term recovery, as detox alone often does not address the behavioral, social, and psychological aspects of addiction.

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 Who is involved in the drug detox process? 
 

 

A multidisciplinary team is involved in the drug detox process to ensure comprehensive care. This team typically includes physicians specialized in addiction medicine, nurses, psychologists, psychiatrists, therapists, and social workers. Each professional plays a critical role in providing medical monitoring, psychological support, and crafting a continuum of care post-detox. Their combined expertise helps manage the physical and emotional challenges during detox and prepares the individual for the next steps in recovery.

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is rapid detox? 
 

 

Rapid detox is a method of detoxification that speeds up the process of eliminating drugs from the body. Under general anesthesia, medications are administered to precipitate withdrawal, aiming to complete the detox process quickly, often within hours. While this method might appeal due to its speed, it is controversial and can carry significant risks, including complications from anesthesia and a higher potential for acute withdrawal symptoms. It is generally recommended to opt for a more gradual, medically supervised detox process to ensure safety and effectiveness.

							<div data-rocket-location-hash="9bb5569590c8472c17936a1a153c7d0a" class="elementor-background-overlay"></div>
							<div data-rocket-location-hash="d31440aa942a444a69cb42ee50b0dfd2" class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-no">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-39800f9" data-id="39800f9" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-93f4bc2 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="93f4bc2" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h1 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default"><span class="h1-smalltext block">United Healthcare and Addiction Treatment:</span>
A Journey Towards Recovery in Southern Claifornia</h1>				</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-ee2f6a5 elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-stretched elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="ee2f6a5" data-element_type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic","stretch_section":"section-stretched"}">
						<div data-rocket-location-hash="a300110931994dff244f7ebcfd7c94dd" class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-no">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-262b819" data-id="262b819" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-5734eb3 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="5734eb3" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-4abcde1" data-id="4abcde1" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c155d9f elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="c155d9f" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Addiction is a formidable opponent, an insidious force that infiltrates lives, leaving a trail of physical, emotional, and relational devastation in its wake. </h4>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c468529 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="c468529" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>If you or a loved one grapple with substance abuse, it’s crucial to remember that help is within reach, and you’re never alone in this battle. For those with United Healthcare rehab coverage, Southern California Recovery Centers (SCRCs) presens a beacon of hope, offering a comprehensive and individualized approach to addiction treatment.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-240416b elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-stretched elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="240416b" data-element_type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic","stretch_section":"section-stretched"}">
						<div data-rocket-location-hash="24bebd414c07cc17069ac99df740012e" class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-no">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-4ce85fa" data-id="4ce85fa" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-747a5a3 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="747a5a3" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-db2cb94" data-id="db2cb94" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-b86c400 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="b86c400" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Understanding Addiction</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-f6df912 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="f6df912" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Addiction is a chronic issue that compels an individual to seek and use drugs or alcohol, despite harmful consequences. It can affect anyone, regardless of age, race, socioeconomic status, or lifestyle. Addiction often masquerades in different forms, from illicit drugs and prescription medications to alcohol and behavioral addictions.</p><p>The recovery journey from addiction is seldom linear and requires professional assistance. Thankfully, United Healthcare policyholders have access to world-class addiction treatment services offered by SCRCs.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
				<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-6200ae5" data-id="6200ae5" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">

									<p>United Healthcare does provide coverage for addiction rehab at United Healthcare rehab facilities.</p><p>Covered by one of the leading health insurance providers in the United States, United Healthcare rehab facilities recognize addiction as a significant health issue and offer care for a wide range of substance abuse issues. 					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Substance Abuse & Addiction Treatment Options at Southern California Recovery Centers</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-75d8ca15 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="75d8ca15" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>At Southern California Recovery Centers, a diverse range of treatment options is offered to address the complex nature of addiction. Each treatment modality is designed to treat different aspects of addiction and is integrated into a personalized treatment plan.</p><p><b>Medical Detoxification:</b> This first step in treatment ensures a safe and comfortable transition through withdrawal under medical supervision.</p><p><b>Inpatient Treatment:</b> Clients live on-site in a supportive environment, receiving round-the-clock medical care and therapeutic support.</p><p><b>Outpatient Treatment:</b> Designed for individuals who cannot commit to a residential program, outpatient treatment allows clients to receive therapy while maintaining their daily responsibilities.</p><p><b>Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP):</b> This is a highly structured program where clients receive intensive treatment during the day but can return home in the evening.</p><p><b>Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP): </b>This program is less intensive than a PHP but still provides a comprehensive approach to addiction treatment.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-2e12af6 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="2e12af6" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-12913b6" data-id="12913b6" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-ff557a7 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="ff557a7" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p><b>Dual Diagnosis Treatment:</b> This treatment addresses co-occurring mental health conditions along with substance abuse, recognizing the interlinked nature of these disorders.</p><p><b>Holistic Therapy:</b> Techniques such as yoga, meditation, acupuncture, and nutritional counseling are used to treat the whole person rather than just the symptoms of addiction.</p><p><b>Aftercare and Relapse Prevention:</b> These critical components of the recovery journey include ongoing therapy, support groups, and individual counseling to help maintain long-term sobriety.</p><p>Each treatment option is designed to meet individual needs, taking into account the unique circumstances and recovery goals of every client. At Southern California Recovery Centers, a premier drug rehab that accepts United Healthcare insurance, the goal is to guide you towards a life of recovery, resilience, and renewal.</p>								</div>
				</div>

									<p>Southern California Recovery Centers are situated in some of the most serene and tranquil environments that Southern California has to offer. </p><p>Our locations span across beautiful coastal towns, each providing a peaceful retreat conducive to healing and recovery. Every center is designed to be a safe, welcoming space, combining the comforts of home with the professionalism of a healthcare facility. </p><p>Whether you’re gazing upon the sweeping views of the Pacific Ocean or strolling through the sun-dappled courtyards, our locations provide the ideal backdrop to your recovery journey. </p><p>Please reach out to our team for specific details about our various locations across Southern California. 				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Beginning your journey to recovery at Southern California Recovery Centers is as straightforward as it is compassionate. </p><p>Our admissions process starts with a simple phone call to our team. During this initial conversation, we conduct a thorough assessment to understand your specific needs and circumstances. We then work directly with United Healthcare to determine the extent of your coverage and outline the most beneficial treatment plan. </p><p>Once the insurance details are clarified, we arrange for your admission into one of our programs, be it residential, outpatient, or a partial hospitalization program. Rest assured, we maintain a strict confidentiality policy, and your information is always treated with the utmost respect and privacy. </p><p>At SCRCs, we strive to make the admissions process as seamless and stress-free as possible, because we believe that your focus should be solely on the path to recovery.</p>								</div>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

 United Healthcare and Addiction Treatment: 
A Journey Towards Recovery in Southern Claifornia
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Addiction is a formidable opponent, an insidious force that infiltrates lives, leaving a trail of physical, emotional, and relational devastation in its wake. 
 

 

 

 

 
If you or a loved one grapple with substance abuse, it’s crucial to remember that help is within reach, and you’re never alone in this battle. For those with United Healthcare rehab coverage, Southern California Recovery Centers (SCRCs) presens a beacon of hope, offering a comprehensive and individualized approach to addiction treatment.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Understanding Addiction
 

 

 

 

 
Addiction is a chronic issue that compels an individual to seek and use drugs or alcohol, despite harmful consequences. It can affect anyone, regardless of age, race, socioeconomic status, or lifestyle. Addiction often masquerades in different forms, from illicit drugs and prescription medications to alcohol and behavioral addictions.

The recovery journey from addiction is seldom linear and requires professional assistance. Thankfully, United Healthcare policyholders have access to world-class addiction treatment services offered by SCRCs.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Does United Healthcare Cover Rehab?
 

 

 

 

 
United Healthcare does provide coverage for addiction rehab at United Healthcare rehab facilities.

Covered by one of the leading health insurance providers in the United States, United Healthcare rehab facilities recognize addiction as a significant health issue and offer care for a wide range of substance abuse issues. Depending on your specific plan, coverage at rehabs that take United Healthcare  may include detoxification, residential and outpatient treatment programs, counseling sessions, and aftercare services. 

The level of coverage at United Healthcare rehab facilities varies based on individual insurance plans, and it is essential to verify the details with United Healthcare directly. At Southern California Recovery Centers, our dedicated team can assist you in navigating the process, ensuring that you maximize the benefits of your United Healthcare inpatient rehab coverage to receive the best possible care.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
United Healthcare and Addiction Treatment Coverage
 

 

 

 

 
United Healthcare rehab facilities provide care in a variety of forms, including detoxification services, residential and outpatient treatment programs, individual and group counseling sessions, as well as aftercare and relapse prevention plans.

United Healthcare addiction treatment insurance adopts a proactive approach to help members make informed decisions about their healthcare, striving to reduce the financial burden of addiction treatment. Selecting a United Healthcare rehab center, such as SCRCs, can simplify the process, making it more accessible and affordable.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Why Choose SCRCs?
 

 

 

 

 
Here’s why choosing a United Healthcare rehab like SCRCs is a key step towards recovery:
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Comprehensive Care
 

 

 

 

 
SCRCs employ a multidisciplinary team of experts, including physicians, therapists, nutritionists, and peer recovery specialists, ensuring comprehensive care for each individual.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Evidence-Based Treatment
 

 

 

 

 
SCRCs follow evidence-based practices to deliver effective and outcome-oriented addiction treatment.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Personalized Treatment Plans
 

 

 

 

 
Recognizing the unique journey of every individual, SCRCs create tailored treatment plans that cater to individual needs and recovery goals.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Well-Focused Environment
 

 

 

 

 
The tranquil settings of Southern California provide a conducive environment for healing, offering peace, rejuvenation, and inspiration.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Ongoing Support
 

 

 

 

 
SCRCs understand that recovery extends beyond treatment, hence, they offer ongoing support to help individuals navigate the lifelong journey of sobriety.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California’s Premier Outpatient Addiction Recovery Center
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Substance Abuse & Addiction Treatment Options at Southern California Recovery Centers
 

 

 

 

 
At Southern California Recovery Centers, a diverse range of treatment options is offered to address the complex nature of addiction. Each treatment modality is designed to treat different aspects of addiction and is integrated into a personalized treatment plan.

 Medical Detoxification: This first step in treatment ensures a safe and comfortable transition through withdrawal under medical supervision.

 Inpatient Treatment: Clients live on-site in a supportive environment, receiving round-the-clock medical care and therapeutic support.

 Outpatient Treatment: Designed for individuals who cannot commit to a residential program, outpatient treatment allows clients to receive therapy while maintaining their daily responsibilities.

 Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP): This is a highly structured program where clients receive intensive treatment during the day but can return home in the evening.

 Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP): This program is less intensive than a PHP but still provides a comprehensive approach to addiction treatment.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Dual Diagnosis Treatment: This treatment addresses co-occurring mental health conditions along with substance abuse, recognizing the interlinked nature of these disorders.

 Holistic Therapy: Techniques such as yoga, meditation, acupuncture, and nutritional counseling are used to treat the whole person rather than just the symptoms of addiction.

 Aftercare and Relapse Prevention: These critical components of the recovery journey include ongoing therapy, support groups, and individual counseling to help maintain long-term sobriety.

Each treatment option is designed to meet individual needs, taking into account the unique circumstances and recovery goals of every client. At Southern California Recovery Centers, a premier drug rehab that accepts United Healthcare insurance, the goal is to guide you towards a life of recovery, resilience, and renewal.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Locations
 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers are situated in some of the most serene and tranquil environments that Southern California has to offer. 

Our locations span across beautiful coastal towns, each providing a peaceful retreat conducive to healing and recovery. Every center is designed to be a safe, welcoming space, combining the comforts of home with the professionalism of a healthcare facility. 

Whether you’re gazing upon the sweeping views of the Pacific Ocean or strolling through the sun-dappled courtyards, our locations provide the ideal backdrop to your recovery journey. 

Please reach out to our team for specific details about our various locations across Southern California. We are ready to welcome you into our healing spaces, where the transformative journey to recovery begins.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Embrace a Substance-Free Life with SCRCs
 

 

 

 

 
Recovering from addiction is a profound transformation, a journey from darkness to light. It requires courage, resilience, and above all, the right support. 

With United Healthcare and SCRCs, you’ll find that support – a committed team of professionals who will stand by you at every step, helping you reclaim your life from the shackles of addiction.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Admissions Process
 

 

 

 

 
Beginning your journey to recovery at Southern California Recovery Centers is as straightforward as it is compassionate. 

Our admissions process starts with a simple phone call to our team. During this initial conversation, we conduct a thorough assessment to understand your specific needs and circumstances. We then work directly with United Healthcare to determine the extent of your coverage and outline the most beneficial treatment plan. 

Once the insurance details are clarified, we arrange for your admission into one of our programs, be it residential, outpatient, or a partial hospitalization program. Rest assured, we maintain a strict confidentiality policy, and your information is always treated with the utmost respect and privacy. 

At SCRCs, we strive to make the admissions process as seamless and stress-free as possible, because we believe that your focus should be solely on the path to recovery.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Admissions 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Take The First Step to Recovery
 

 

 

 

 
Addiction doesn’t have to be a life sentence. With the right help and support, recovery is within reach. 

For United Healthcare members, SCRCs provide a powerful blend of professional care, personalized treatments, and serene environment conducive to healing. Take the first step towards recovery today, and experience the life-altering power of a compassionate, comprehensive, and dedicated approach to addiction treatment.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Call Us Today!
 

 

 

 

 
Get the help you or a loved one deserves!
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
34249 Camino Capistrano, Dana Point, CA 92624
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-dd95d03 elementor-widget-divider--view-line elementor-widget elementor-widget-divider" data-id="dd95d03" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="divider.default">

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4a7d4574 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="4a7d4574" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>At Southern California Recovery Centers, we believe that affordability of treatment should never be a factor in getting treatment you deserve. We are proud to accept many insurance plans to cover the costs of your treatment. Depending on your specific policy, insurance may cover all or a significant portion of your treatment expenses, making your recovery journey more affordable and accessible. It’s important to remember that coverage varies widely between insurance providers and individual policies, so it’s always best to verify your coverage directly. As we mentioned, we work with a variety of insurance plans and options. Learn about a few of the many insurance plans we work with listed below, to get you the necessary treatment.</p><ul class="three-col-list leftalign"><li><a href="https://socalrecovery.com/anthem-blue-cross-blue-shield-rehab-addiction-treatment/">Anthem BCBS</a></li><li><a href="https://socalrecovery.com/aetna-rehab-addiction-treatment-coverage/">Aetna</a></li><li><a href="https://socalrecovery.com/geha-rehab-addiction-treatment-coverage/">Geha</a></li><li><a href="https://socalrecovery.com/united-healthcare-rehab-facilities-addiction-treatment/">United Healthcare</a></li><li><a href="https://socalrecovery.com/umr-insurance-rehab-coverage-southern-california">UMR</a></li><li><a href="https://socalrecovery.com/addiction-treatment-rehab-that-accepts-nyship/">NYShip</a></li><li><a href="https://socalrecovery.com/addiction-treatment-rehab-that-accepts-cigna/">Cigna</a></li><li><a href="https://socalrecovery.com/addiction-treatment-rehab-that-accepts-teamsters-union/">Teamsters Union</a></li><li><a href="https://socalrecovery.com/warehouse-workers-union-addiction-treatment-rehab/"">Workers Union</a></li></ul>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Part of the admissions process for rehab involves verifying your insurance coverage which we make as simple as possible and this is a 100% confidential process. Simply contact our friendly admissions team. From there, our experienced and knowledgeable staff will assist you in determining your coverage and explaining what your insurance will pay. Alternatively, you can complete an insurance verification form available on our website, providing us with the necessary information to check your benefits on your behalf. We assure you that all information shared during this process is held in strict confidentiality, in accordance with HIPAA regulations.</p>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>We acknowledge that taking that inchoate step in the direction of recovery can be daunting. Thankfully, our caring staff members and compassionate mental health professionals are all here to support you every step of the process.</p><p>We are knowledgeable, empathetic, and happy to answer any questions you may have. Our objective is to empathetically escort you through the admission process and provide you with all the critical details so you are armed to make an informed decision. You can contact us via message, and we will respond promptly.</p><p>At Southern California Recovery Centers, we are dedicated to uplifting you on your journey to a healthier, addiction-free life. Today is the day to take the courageous step towards recovery, and we are honored to stand beside you.</p>								</div>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

 Admissions Process at Southern California Recovery Centers
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
At Southern California Recovery Centers, we are committed to paving the way to a healthier, happier, and addiction-free life for all who reach out to us for help.
 

 

 

 

 
Our dedicated team of professionals understands the complexities of the rehab admissions process and provides comprehensive, compassionate care to individuals struggling with alcohol and drug addiction. Located amid the serene, scenic beauty of Southern California, our state-of-the-art recovery centers offer a sanctuary for healing and transformation, empowering our clients to reclaim their lives and realize their fullest potential.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California’s Premier Outpatient Addiction Recovery Center
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
How to Get Started
 

 

 

 

 
Beginning the drug rehab admissions process with Southern California Recovery Centers is straightforward and stress-free. First, we recommend you reach out to us directly by phone, where our friendly admissions team is ready to guide you through your initial steps. This involves understanding your specific needs, explaining our various treatment programs, and working together to determine the best treatment approach for your situation.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Call Us Today!
 

 

 

 

 
Get the help you or a loved one deserves!
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Insurance and Treatment
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
At Southern California Recovery Centers, we believe that affordability of treatment should never be a factor in getting treatment you deserve. We are proud to accept many insurance plans to cover the costs of your treatment. Depending on your specific policy, insurance may cover all or a significant portion of your treatment expenses, making your recovery journey more affordable and accessible. It’s important to remember that coverage varies widely between insurance providers and individual policies, so it’s always best to verify your coverage directly. As we mentioned, we work with a variety of insurance plans and options. Learn about a few of the many insurance plans we work with listed below, to get you the necessary treatment.
 
 Anthem BCBS 

 Aetna 

 Geha 

 United Healthcare 

 UMR 

 NYShip 

 Cigna 

 Teamsters Union 

 Workers Union 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Insurance Verification
 

 

 

 

 
Part of the admissions process for rehab involves verifying your insurance coverage which we make as simple as possible and this is a 100% confidential process. Simply contact our friendly admissions team. From there, our experienced and knowledgeable staff will assist you in determining your coverage and explaining what your insurance will pay. Alternatively, you can complete an insurance verification form available on our website, providing us with the necessary information to check your benefits on your behalf. We assure you that all information shared during this process is held in strict confidentiality, in accordance with HIPAA regulations.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Verify Your Insurance
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Contacting Southern California Recovery Centers
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
We acknowledge that taking that inchoate step in the direction of recovery can be daunting. Thankfully, our caring staff members and compassionate mental health professionals are all here to support you every step of the process.

We are knowledgeable, empathetic, and happy to answer any questions you may have. Our objective is to empathetically escort you through the admission process and provide you with all the critical details so you are armed to make an informed decision. You can contact us via message, and we will respond promptly.

At Southern California Recovery Centers, we are dedicated to uplifting you on your journey to a healthier, addiction-free life. Today is the day to take the courageous step towards recovery, and we are honored to stand beside you.

						<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-853d82c elementor-section-height-min-height elementor-section-items-stretch elementor-section-stretched elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default" data-id="853d82c" data-element_type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic","stretch_section":"section-stretched"}">
							<div data-rocket-location-hash="9bb5569590c8472c17936a1a153c7d0a" class="elementor-background-overlay"></div>
							<div data-rocket-location-hash="d31440aa942a444a69cb42ee50b0dfd2" class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-no">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-93a7b95" data-id="93a7b95" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a4f9316 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="a4f9316" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h1 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default"><span class="h1-smalltext block">UMR Insurance Rehab & Addiction Treatment Coverage at </span>
Southern California Recovery Centers</h1>				</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>

		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-eaff2b5 elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-stretched elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="eaff2b5" data-element_type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic","stretch_section":"section-stretched"}">
						<div data-rocket-location-hash="a300110931994dff244f7ebcfd7c94dd" class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-no">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-d0fd17f" data-id="d0fd17f" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-6c6eb6a elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="6c6eb6a" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-ef0f96a" data-id="ef0f96a" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a75ebf5 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="a75ebf5" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Substance addiction is a serious condition that has the potential to negatively impact the lives of individuals and their loved ones. </h4>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-89c126a elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="89c126a" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Seeking professional help is a crucial first step in the journey towards recovery. However, the prospect of financing treatment can seem daunting. At Southern California Recovery Centers, we want you to focus on recovery, not financial constraints. That’s why we accept various insurance plans, including United Medical Resources (UMR) coverage. </p><p>If you have UMR insurance rehab coverage and struggle with substance addiction, you have access to quality addiction treatment at our center. Find out more about UMR Insurance rehab coverage by reading below.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-2cdd5b0 elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-stretched elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="2cdd5b0" data-element_type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic","stretch_section":"section-stretched"}">
						<div data-rocket-location-hash="24bebd414c07cc17069ac99df740012e" class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-no">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-5995e90" data-id="5995e90" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-8d096df elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="8d096df" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-b4af76c" data-id="b4af76c" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-e3ef27b elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="e3ef27b" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Understanding UMR Insurance</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-cba69d3 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="cba69d3" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>UMR is a third-party administrator for UnitedHealthcare, one of the largest health insurance providers in the United States. 									<p>At Southern California Recovery Centers, we provide a myriad of treatment options designed to address a wide range of substance use disorders. </p><p>Our offerings include medically-supervised detoxification, residential and outpatient treatment programs, and a variety of therapy modalities including individual, group, and family therapy. 									<p>Our admissions process at Southern California Recovery Centers is designed to be as straightforward and stress-free as possible. </p><p>Once you reach out to us, our admissions team will guide you through a confidential assessment to determine the severity and nature of your addiction. 			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 UMR Insurance Rehab & Addiction Treatment Coverage at 
Southern California Recovery Centers
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Substance addiction is a serious condition that has the potential to negatively impact the lives of individuals and their loved ones. 
 

 

 

 

 
Seeking professional help is a crucial first step in the journey towards recovery. However, the prospect of financing treatment can seem daunting. At Southern California Recovery Centers, we want you to focus on recovery, not financial constraints. That’s why we accept various insurance plans, including United Medical Resources (UMR) coverage. 

If you have UMR insurance rehab coverage and struggle with substance addiction, you have access to quality addiction treatment at our center. Find out more about UMR Insurance rehab coverage by reading below.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Understanding UMR Insurance
 

 

 

 

 
UMR is a third-party administrator for UnitedHealthcare, one of the largest health insurance providers in the United States. It offers an extensive range of health benefits and services, including coverage for substance use disorder treatment. 

While every policy differs, many UMR rehab insurance plans offer significant coverage for drug and alcohol addiction treatment. The details and extent of your coverage will depend on your specific plan, but know that help is available and often more affordable than you might imagine.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Does UMR Cover Rehab?
 

 

 

 

 
UMR, as an affiliate of UnitedHealthcare, does often provide coverage for drug and alcohol rehab services. These services can range from detoxification to inpatient and outpatient treatment programs, as well as aftercare planning. The degree of coverage, however, can vary significantly depending on the specifics of your individual UMR insurance rehab coverage. 

To determine the extent of your coverage for rehab services, it’s important to directly contact UMR or utilize their online resources.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Leveraging UMR Coverage at Southern California Recovery Centers
 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers, an alcohol rehab covered by UMR, is committed to providing exceptional care to our clients. Our multidisciplinary team of addiction specialists works closely with each individual to create a personalized recovery plan. We aim to ensure that our treatment approach matches your unique needs, preferences, and California drug rehab insurance UMR coverage.

To make the most out of your insurance, here’s how you can proceed:To make the most out of your insurance, here’s how you can proceed:
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Verify Your Insurance Coverage
 

 

 

 

 
Begin by contacting UMR addiction coverage specialists or using their online services to confirm the specifics of your coverage. You’ll want to understand the extent of your coverage, any deductibles or co-pays, and whether pre-authorization is required for specific services.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Confidential Assessment
 

 

 

 

 
Contact us to arrange a confidential assessment. During this session, our addiction professionals will evaluate your needs and discuss potential treatment plans.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Plan Your Treatment
 

 

 

 

 
Based on your assessment and UMR rehab coverage, we will develop a personalized treatment plan designed to maximize your recovery outcomes while minimizing out-of-pocket costs.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
What Makes Southern California Recovery Centers Unique?
 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers offer a unique blend of evidence-based treatments, holistic therapies, and supportive services designed to address the physical, psychological, and emotional aspects of addiction. We’re proud to offer a supportive and nurturing environment that encourages personal growth, self-awareness, and empowerment.

Here’s what sets us apart:
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Personalized Treatment Plans
 

 

 

 

 
Our programs are not one-size-fits-all. We understand that each person’s journey to recovery is unique, which is why we work with you to develop a personalized treatment plan that aligns with your individual needs and goals.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Expert Care Team
 

 

 

 

 
Our multidisciplinary team comprises addiction specialists, physicians, therapists, and support staff who are committed to providing compassionate, high-quality care. Our team works hand-in-hand with you, guiding you every step of the way on your road to recovery.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Holistic Approach
 

 

 

 

 
We believe that recovery involves more than just addressing substance use; it’s about treating the whole person. Therefore, we incorporate a variety of therapies – including individual and group counseling, nutritional guidance, physical fitness, mindfulness practices, and recreational activities – into our treatment programs.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Long-Term Support
 

 

 

 

 
Recovery doesn’t end when you leave our center. We provide ongoing support and aftercare services to help you maintain your progress and cope with the challenges of post-treatment life.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California Recovery Centers

 

 

 

 

 
Southern California’s Premier Outpatient Addiction Recovery Center
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Substance Abuse & Addiction Treatment Options at Southern California Recovery Centers
 

 

 

 

 
At Southern California Recovery Centers, we provide a myriad of treatment options designed to address a wide range of substance use disorders. 

Our offerings include medically-supervised detoxification, residential and outpatient treatment programs, and a variety of therapy modalities including individual, group, and family therapy. Additionally, we offer holistic therapies such as art therapy, yoga, and mindfulness training, aiming to treat not just the physical symptoms of addiction, but also the psychological and emotional factors that contribute to substance abuse.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Locations
 

 

 

 

 
Our treatment centers are strategically located across Southern California, each offering a serene and therapeutic environment conducive to recovery. 

Our facilities provide a safe space away from everyday stresses, where you can focus solely on your healing journey. Each location is designed with comfort in mind, providing both communal and private spaces for relaxation and reflection. Our locations serve as a peaceful backdrop to your recovery, allowing you to rebuild and recover in an environment that encourages wellness and growth.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call Today 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Navigating the Road to Recovery
 

 

 

 

 
Recovery is a process, and every person’s journey is unique. It may not always be easy, but with the right support and resources, it is absolutely achievable. By choosing to seek help, you are taking a courageous step towards a brighter, healthier future.

Remember, UMR insurance opens the door to a myriad of recovery options at Southern California Recovery Centers. Leveraging your insurance coverage not only makes treatment more affordable but also grants you access to comprehensive, evidence-based treatment that can truly transform your life.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Admissions Process
 

 

 

 

 
Our admissions process at Southern California Recovery Centers is designed to be as straightforward and stress-free as possible. 

Once you reach out to us, our admissions team will guide you through a confidential assessment to determine the severity and nature of your addiction. They’ll then review your UMR insurance plan to identify your coverage specifics. With this information, we will create a personalized treatment plan that aligns with your needs, preferences, and insurance coverage. 

Our goal is to make the admissions process as seamless as possible, allowing you to focus on what truly matters: your journey towards recovery.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Admissions 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Begin Your Recovery Journey
 

 

 

 

 
Overcoming addiction is a challenging journey, but it’s one that you don’t have to navigate alone. If you’re covered by UMR, it’s important to remember that you have access to quality care at Southern California Recovery Centers. We strive to provide a holistic and supportive environment that fosters healing, growth, and lasting recovery.

Remember, seeking help is the most courageous step in the recovery process. We’re here to guide you through every stage of your journey, ensuring that financial constraints don’t become a roadblock on your path to a healthier, sober life. 

Contact us today to learn more about how we can help you leverage your UMR insurance coverage for addiction treatment. Together, we can build a brighter future.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Call Us Today!
 

 

 

 

 
Get the help you or a loved one deserves!
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
34249 Camino Capistrano, Dana Point, CA 92624
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (800) 410-6552

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h1 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default"><span class="h1-smalltext block"></span>Alcohol Detox</h1>				</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
